body:
Hi Roger, just confirming this week's handoff for Mei. I can keep her Wednesday and Thursday night since you've got the early Night Market prep, and drop her at school Friday morning. Does that still line up with your bakery hours?

One thing — her teacher sent a note that picture day is coming up. Can you make sure she has the green aloha shirt clean? It's in the laundry at your place I think.

Let me know if anything shifts. Thanks.

Kenji
snippet: Hi Roger, just confirming this week's handoff for Mei. I can keep her Wednesday ...
subject: Mei handoff this week

body:
Kenji, that works for me — Wednesday and Thursday with you is perfect, I'm at the bakery before 6 those mornings anyway. I'll have her ready Friday and I'll get the green shirt washed tonight, thanks for the heads up on picture day.

She's been talking nonstop about the tide pools you took her to, by the way. Made her whole week.

Text me if Friday morning gets tight and I'll swing by.

Roger
snippet: Kenji, that works for me — Wednesday and Thursday with you is perfect, I'm at th...
subject: Re: Mei handoff this week

body:
Hey! Are we still on for the beach walk Wednesday evening? I've been cooped up teaching back-to-back classes all week and I am dying to get to the water and actually talk. Kai's with his dad so it'd just be us.

Usual spot at 5:30? I'll bring the good coffee thermos if you bring one of those leftover scones I keep hearing about. Let me know!
snippet: Hey! Are we still on for the beach walk Wednesday evening? I've been cooped up t...
subject: Wednesday beach walk?

body:
Yes! 5:30 at the usual spot, I close the bakery at 2 so I'll have plenty of time to get Mei sorted with my mom first. Deal on the scones — I overbaked a tray of guava ones this morning so they're yours.

I need the walk too honestly, this week has been a grind. See you Wednesday.

Roger
snippet: Yes! 5:30 at the usual spot, I close the bakery at 2 so I'll have plenty of time...
subject: Re: Wednesday beach walk?

body:
Perfect. Guava scones, the ocean, and zero kids for an hour — best plan I've heard all week. I might be five minutes late coming from the studio but I'll text when I'm parking.

So glad we kept this going. See you there!
snippet: Perfect. Guava scones, the ocean, and zero kids for an hour — best plan I've hea...
subject: Re: Wednesday beach walk?

body:
Aloha Roger,

Thanks for the reorder. We've got your 70% dark single-origin couverture and the cacao nibs ready to ship — confirming the quantities below before we pull from inventory:

- Dark couverture 70%: 40 lb
- Milk couverture 38%: 20 lb
- Cacao nibs: 10 lb

Heads up that our spring harvest pricing kicks in next month, so if you want to lock in current rates for your holiday baking it'd be worth bumping the order now. Let me know and we'll have it on the truck to Kaimuki by end of week.

Mahalo,
Hawaiian Crown Chocolate
snippet: Aloha Roger, Thanks for the reorder. We've got your 70% dark single-origin couve...
subject: Hawaiian Crown order confirmation

body:
Aloha,

Those quantities look right. Let's go ahead and lock in the current rate — bump the dark couverture to 60 lb while we're at it since I'll be running the chocolate babka and the holiday gift boxes back to back.

End of week delivery to the Harding Ave shop is perfect; we open at 6:30 Tuesday through Saturday so any morning works. Put it on the usual account.

Mahalo for the heads up on pricing.

Roger
snippet: Aloha, Those quantities look right. Let's go ahead and lock in the current rate ...
subject: Re: Hawaiian Crown order confirmation

body:
Hi Roger,

Got it — 60 lb dark couverture, 20 lb milk, 10 lb nibs, locked at current pricing. I'll have it loaded for a Thursday morning drop at Harding Ave.

One more thing: we just got a small lot of the Ka'u single-origin in, really bright fruit-forward profile. I set aside a 5 lb tasting block for you in case you want to play with it for a special. No charge, just curious what you'd do with it.

Mahalo,
Hawaiian Crown Chocolate
snippet: Hi Roger, Got it — 60 lb dark couverture, 20 lb milk, 10 lb nibs, locked at curr...
subject: Re: Hawaiian Crown order confirmation

body:
Aloha — you had me at Ka'u single-origin. Throw the tasting block on the Thursday delivery and I'll taste it that afternoon. If it's as bright as you say I'm thinking a dark chocolate and lilikoi tart for the weekend case.

Appreciate you thinking of me. See the driver Thursday.

Roger
snippet: Aloha — you had me at Ka'u single-origin. Throw the tasting block on the Thursday ...
subject: Re: Hawaiian Crown order confirmation

body:
Hi Roger,

I was referred to Koa Morning Star by a friend who said you do incredible custom cakes. My daughter is turning 7 next month and I'd love to order a two-tier cake for about 25 people. She's obsessed with the ocean so something with a turtle / reef theme would be a dream.

One important thing — one of her cousins has a tree-nut allergy, so I'd need the whole cake to be nut-free if that's possible. Do you do custom orders like this, and what would the lead time and cost look like?

Thank you!
Danielle Okafor
snippet: Hi Roger, I was referred to Koa Morning Star by a friend who said you do incredi...
subject: Custom birthday cake inquiry

body:
Hi Danielle,

Thank you so much, and happy almost-birthday to your daughter! Yes, I'd love to do a two-tier ocean-themed cake for 25 — turtles and a little reef in buttercream is right up my alley.

Nut allergies I take very seriously (my own daughter has a tree-nut allergy), so I can absolutely do the whole cake nut-free and prepped on a cleaned station. For a two-tier custom like this I'd quote $145, and I'd want at least 10 days' lead time. Pickup is at the shop on Harding Ave.

If you can tell me the date and her favorite cake flavor, I'll get you on the calendar.

Warmly,
Roger
Koa Morning Star Bakery
snippet: Hi Danielle, Thank you so much, and happy almost-birthday to your daughter! Yes,...
subject: Re: Custom birthday cake inquiry

body:
That's wonderful, and it's so reassuring to hear you deal with nut allergies firsthand — that alone made my decision.

The party is on the 21st. Her favorite is vanilla with strawberry, if that works for the layers. $145 is totally fine. What do you need from me to lock it in — a deposit?

Thank you, Roger. I can already tell this is going to make her day.

Danielle
snippet: That's wonderful, and it's so reassuring to hear you deal with nut allergies fir...
subject: Re: Custom birthday cake inquiry

body:
Vanilla with strawberry is a classic — she'll love it. The 21st works; I'll block it on the calendar now for an afternoon pickup.

A $50 deposit holds the date, with the $95 balance due at pickup. I'll send a Square link to this email you can pay whenever's easy. I'll also confirm the nut-free prep in writing on your order slip so there's no question.

Looking forward to making this one.

Roger
snippet: Vanilla with strawberry is a classic — she'll love it. The 21st works; I'll bloc...
subject: Re: Custom birthday cake inquiry

body:
Just paid the deposit through the link — so easy, thank you. The 21st it is.

And thank you for putting the nut-free note on the slip, that gives me real peace of mind. I'll let the other parents know dessert is fully covered. See you on pickup day!

Danielle
snippet: Just paid the deposit through the link — so easy, thank you. The 21st it is. And...
subject: Re: Custom birthday cake inquiry

body:
Dear Mr. Webb,

This is a reminder from the Kaimuki Elementary front office. We have Mei's updated allergy action plan on file, but the physician signature page from Dr. Ching has not been returned for this school year. Please send the signed page at your earliest convenience so our health room records stay current.

Also, a reminder that early-release Wednesday this month means dismissal at 1:15 PM rather than the usual time. Please make sure Mei's pickup arrangement reflects that.

Thank you,
Kaimuki Elementary Front Office
snippet: Dear Mr. Webb, This is a reminder from the Kaimuki Elementary front office. We h...
subject: Mei Webb — allergy plan signature needed

body:
Hello,

Thank you for the reminder. I have an appointment with Dr. Ching's office this week and I'll have the signature page completed and dropped at the front office by Friday. I want Mei's allergy plan fully up to date — tree-nut, as you have on file.

Noted on the 1:15 early release. Her grandmother, Grace Webb, will be the pickup that day; she's already on Mei's authorized list. Please let me know if you need anything else from me.

Mahalo,
Roger Webb
snippet: Hello, Thank you for the reminder. I have an appointment with Dr. Ching's office...
subject: Re: Mei Webb — allergy plan signature needed

body:
Aloha Roger,

We're finalizing the vendor lineup for the next Kaimuki Night Market and would love to have Koa Morning Star back — you were one of the most-talked-about booths last time. Can you confirm you'll take your usual corner spot near the Harding Ave entrance?

A few logistics: load-in is 4:00 PM, market runs 5:30 to 9:00. Power is limited this round, so let me know if you need an outlet for a warmer or if you're going all ambient. And please send your menu for the event so we can list you on the map.

Mahalo,
Kaimuki Night Market
snippet: Aloha Roger, We're finalizing the vendor lineup for the next Kaimuki Night Marke...
subject: Night Market vendor confirmation

body:
Aloha,

Count us in — I'll take the usual corner near the Harding Ave entrance, that spot's been good to us. Load-in at 4:00 works; I'll have Juno helping me set up.

I will need one outlet for a small warmer this time since I'm bringing the malasadas hot. Everything else is ambient. Menu for the map: guava-cream malasadas, chocolate babka slices, lilikoi tarts, and a nut-free butter mochi (I always flag that one clearly for families).

Let me know the final date and I'll get it on the bakery calendar. Mahalo!

Roger
snippet: Aloha, Count us in — I'll take the usual corner near the Harding Ave entrance, t...
subject: Re: Night Market vendor confirmation

body:
Perfect, you're locked in for the corner spot and we've got you down for one outlet. Menu looks great — the nut-free butter mochi callout is exactly the kind of thing families look for, so thank you for that.

Final date is the third Saturday of the month, load-in 4:00 PM as noted. We'll send the vendor map and parking pass a few days ahead. So glad to have Koa Morning Star back.

Mahalo,
Kaimuki Night Market
snippet: Perfect, you're locked in for the corner spot and we've got you down for one out...
subject: Re: Night Market vendor confirmation
